name: babelwrap-mcp
description: MCP server for BabelWrap — give AI agents web browsing superpowers. Navigate, extract, search, screenshot, and interact with any webpage.

tools.name: babelwrap_new_session
tools.description: Create a new browser session for web interaction

tools.name: babelwrap_close_session
tools.description: Close and clean up a browser session

tools.name: babelwrap_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL and get a structured snapshot

tools.name: babelwrap_snapshot
tools.description: Get the current page state as a structured snapshot

tools.name: babelwrap_click
tools.description: Click an element using natural language description

tools.name: babelwrap_fill
tools.description: Fill an input field with a value

tools.name: babelwrap_submit
tools.description: Submit a form on the current page

tools.name: babelwrap_extract
tools.description: Extract structured data using natural language query

tools.name: babelwrap_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page

tools.name: babelwrap_upload
tools.description: Upload a file to a file input element

tools.name: babelwrap_hover
tools.description: Hover over an element on the page

tools.name: babelwrap_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page up or down

tools.name: babelwrap_wait_for
tools.description: Wait for a condition on the page

tools.name: babelwrap_list_pages
tools.description: List all open pages/tabs in the session
